items.title: American Express Growth Story Links Sports Experiences And New World Trade Center HQ
items.description: American Express announced expanded partnerships with major sports teams and venues in the New York/New Jersey and Atlanta areas, broadening its footprint in live entertainment. The company is planning a custom-built global headquarters at 2 World Trade Center in New York City, designed to support long term growth and employee well being. These moves aim to deepen cardholder engagement through premium experiences while reinforcing American Express's role in New York City's economic...
